name: templates: each template includes a short license header (MIT or operator-default) per H-8 attribution sweep
command: for t in vitest.react.config.ts playwright.config.ts size-limit.config.js; do head -5 "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/templates/$t" | grep -iE "license|copyright|MIT|Apache" >/dev/null || { echo "FAIL $t missing license header" 1>&2; exit 1; }; done; echo ok 1>&2
